final:
module logic_gate (
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input E,
    input F,
    input G,
    input H,
    output X
);

    assign X = (A & B) | (~C & D) | (E ^ F) | (~G & H);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      assign Y = A & B; assign Z = ~C & D; assign W = E ^ F; assign V = ~G & H; assign X = Y | Z | W | V;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: assign Y = A & B; assign Z = ~C & D; assign W = E ^ F; assign V = ~G & H; assign X = Y | Z | W | V;
